scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:deploy && pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server build && pnpm --dir artifacts/app-ui build && pnpm --dir artifacts/admin-ui build
scripts.typecheck:deploy: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --dir artifacts/app-ui run typecheck && pnpm --dir artifacts/admin-ui run typecheck && pnpm --dir artifacts/remittance-ui run typecheck && pnpm --dir scripts run typecheck
